# terrible_community_general_gitlab_project_members (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `project` (String) The name (or full path) of the GitLab project the member is added to/removed from.

### Optional

- `access_level` (String) The access level for the user. Required if `state=present`, user state is set to present. `owner` was added in community.general 10.6.0.
- `gitlab_user` (String) A username or a list of usernames to add to/remove from the GitLab project. Mutually exclusive with `gitlab_users_access`.
- `gitlab_users_access` (String) Provide a list of user to access level mappings. Every dictionary in this list specifies a user (by username) and the access level the user should have. Mutually exclusive with `gitlab_user` and `access_level`. Use together with `purge_users` to remove all users not specified here from the project.
- `purge_users` (String) Adds/remove users of the given access_level to match the given `gitlab_user`/`gitlab_users_access` list. If omitted do not purge orphaned members. Is only used when `state=present`. `owner` was added in community.general 10.6.0.
- `state` (String) State of the member in the project. On `present`, it adds a user to a GitLab project. On `absent`, it removes a user from a GitLab project.
